title: Ollny 5m 50 LED Fairy Lights Battery Operated, Bright Waterproof Copper Wire Christmas Lights for Indoor Outdoor Lighting, Christmas Tree Bedroom Outside Party Bottle Wedding Decorations (Warm White)
features: Inspire Decorative Ideas: Ollny copper wire fairy lights emit a vivid and warm glow; Wrap them around Christmas trees, fireplaces, garlands, plants, signs, and more, cheer up dark evenings, making them a lovely addition to any decor or festive occasion

Battery-Powered: These lights have 50 bright LEDs on 5 m of copper wire, spaced 10 cm apart; They use 3 AA batteries (NOT included) and feature an ON/OFF button on a compact battery box that can be easily hidden, unrestricted by socket limitations

IP44 Waterproof: Handle any weather, rain or shine! They are even submersible (excluding the battery box), perfect for festive decorations indoors and outdoors; The battery Christmas lights stays cool to the touch, ensuring safety while you enjoy their enchanting glow!

DIY & Bendable & Cuttable: Crafted from high-quality flexible copper wire; You can cut to your desired length; Decorate a dorm, window, living room, patio, hallway, porch, balcony, pergola, corridor, banister, pavilion, fence, tent, shelf

Brilliant Christmas Decor: Add a bit of ambiance to everything from parties and places of business to dorms and bedrooms; Ideal for all occasions, Xmas, parties, Valentine's Day, Thanksgiving, birthdays, weddings, and beyond; Effortlessly add sparkle!
